prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A cartoon bank vault in the center, with a large locked door labeled "private balance". The balance value is visible through a small reinforced window but cannot be directly touched. On either side of the vault, two friendly teller windows are open: one labeled "deposit()" where a hand pushes money in through a secure slot, and one labeled "withdraw()" where money comes out through another secure slot. A "getBalance()" peephole lets someone read the value. A sign on top reads "BankAccount". The vault looks secure but accessible through proper channels.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
